page.title: Advanced Article and Quantifier Nuance
page.subtitle_html: Advanced Article and Quantifier Nuance - C1 article choice, abstract nouns, and precise quantifier meaning.
page.subtitle_text: C1 article choice, abstract nouns, and precise quantifier meaning.

blocks.body: {"level":"C1","intro":"Advanced Article and Quantifier Nuance: compact anchors for precise article and quantifier meaning.","rules":[{"label":"Quantifier nuance","text":"Choose little, a little, few, a few, much, many, and several according to exact meaning and tone.","example":"There is little evidence to support this claim."},{"label":"Article choice","text":"Use a, the, or zero article to control whether a noun is general, specific, countable, or institutional.","example":"The research focuses on education policy."},{"label":"Formal precision","text":"In C1 writing, article and quantifier choices often change the strength of a claim.","example":"A number of issues remain unresolved."}]}

blocks.heading: C1 focus
blocks.body: This compact page exists as the theory anchor for the English Sentence Builder C1 advanced article and quantifier nuance lesson package.
